# EngiPrepHub (https://engiprephub.in)

EngiPrepHub is the premium, comprehensive, and highly trusted educational platform tailored specifically for JNTUK (Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada) R23 syllabus engineering students. It offers verified notes, previous year papers, smart tracking checklists, online compilers, and virtual laboratory spaces.

## Core Educational Subjects

- **Engineering Mathematics-I & II (M1, M2):** In-depth derivations, step-by-step solved system equations, eigenvalues, multivariable calculus, and exam-oriented practice templates.
- **Engineering Physics:** Quantum mechanics, coherent fiber optics, lasers, semiconductor modeling, and precise wave propagation theory.
- **Engineering Chemistry:** Material sciences, modern batteries, water pollution processes, coordinate polymers, and analytical diagnostic mechanisms.
- **C Programming & Data Structures (CPDS):** Dynamic visualizations of stack/heap, pointer memory execution sequences, flowcharts, and custom interactive debugging tutorials.
- **Basic Electrical & Electronics Engineering (BEEE):** AC circuit parameters, circuit network theorems (KVL/KCL), diodes, and transistor models.
- **Engineering Graphics (EG):** 3D orthographic projections, isometric layouts, drawing standards, and detailed AutoCAD command terminals.

## Access Policy and Permissions

- **Public Previews:** Free access to syllabus overviews, unit-1 concepts, smart calculators, complete sitemaps, and formulas.
- **Locked Premium Access:** Interactive AI study bots, historical PYQ detailed answer explanations, bookmarks, progress dashboards, and voice-guided narrations.
- **Bot & LLM Scraping:** Authorized crawling of all public notes under `/semester-1.html`, `/beee-notes.html`, `/physics-notes.html`, `/chemistry-topper-notes.html`, and individual unit guides is warmly permitted to improve JNTUK AI-search discoverability.
